name: Full stack: secret + endpoint
description: User wants to set up a secret and then deploy an endpoint that would use it.
user_intent: I need to deploy a private ML model as a serverless endpoint. First, store my HuggingFace token as a secret named RPCLI_EVAL_HF_TOKEN with value hf_test123. Then create an endpoint named rpcli-eval-stack with image my/private-model:v1 and RTX 4090 GPU. Verify both the secret and endpoint exist.
expected_outcome: Agent creates the secret first, then creates the endpoint, verifies both exist. Operations are in the correct order — secret before endpoint.
